title: Oath-Chain Drag
text: A legal brand tugs at every promise you break.
flavor: The chain is invisible until someone says your name in court.
trigger: When you abandon or fail a contract objective.
penalty: Advance escalation by 1 as the debt is witnessed.
relief: Complete any contract to suppress this scar until your next recall.
upside: When you complete a contract while carrying this scar, gain 1 extra trophy.
